title: Ordering at a Restaurant

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: مَسَاءُ الْخَيْرِ، هَلْ يُوجَدُ طَاوِلَةٌ لِشَخْصَيْنِ؟
lines.bs: Dobro veče, ima li stola za dvije osobe?
lines.en: Good evening, is there a table for two?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: مَسَاءُ النُّورِ! نَعَمْ، تَفَضَّلَا. هَذِهِ طَاوِلَتُكُمَا. هَلْ تُرِيدَانِ قَائِمَةَ الطَّعَامِ؟
lines.bs: Dobro veče! Da, izvolite. Evo vašeg stola. Želite li jelovnik?
lines.en: Good evening! Yes, please come in. Here is your table. Would you like the menu?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: نَعَمْ، مِنْ فَضْلِكَ. وَهَلْ يُمْكِنُكَ أَنْ تُخْبِرَنَا بِأَطْبَاقِ الْيَوْمِ؟
lines.bs: Da, molim. I možeš li nam reći koja su jela dana?
lines.en: Yes, please. And can you tell us about today's specials?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: بِكُلِّ سُرُورٍ. طَبَقُ الْيَوْمِ هُوَ الدَّجَاجُ الْمَشْوِيُّ مَعَ الْأَرُزِّ وَالسَّلَطَةِ.
lines.bs: S velim zadovoljstvom. Jelo dana je pečena piletina s rižom i salatom.
lines.en: With great pleasure. Today's dish is grilled chicken with rice and salad.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: يَبْدُو ذَلِكَ لَذِيذًا. مَا الْمُكَوِّنَاتُ الرَّئِيسِيَّةُ فِي هَذَا الطَّبَقِ؟
lines.bs: To zvuči ukusno. Koji su glavni sastojci u tom jelu?
lines.en: That sounds delicious. What are the main ingredients in that dish?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: الدَّجَاجُ مُتَبَّلٌ بِالثُّومِ وَالزَّيْتِ وَالتَّوَابِلِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ، وَيُقَدَّمُ مَعَ أَرُزٍّ وَخُضَارٍ.
lines.bs: Piletina je marinirana s češnjakom, uljem i prirodnim začinima, i servira se s rižom i povrćem.
lines.en: The chicken is marinated with garlic, oil, and natural spices, and served with rice and vegetables.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: سَآخُذُ طَبَقَ الْيَوْمِ. وَأُرِيدُ أَيْضًا شُورْبَةَ الْعَدَسِ كَمُقَبِّلٍ.
lines.bs: Uzet ću jelo dana. Također želim juhu od leće kao predjelo.
lines.en: I will have today's special. I also want lentil soup as a starter.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: اخْتِيَارٌ مُمْتَازٌ! وَمَاذَا تَشْرَبَانِ؟ لَدَيْنَا عَصَائِرُ طَازَجَةٌ وَمَاءٌ وَشَايٌ.
lines.bs: Odličan izbor! A šta ćete piti? Imamo svježe sokove, vodu i čaj.
lines.en: Excellent choice! And what will you drink? We have fresh juices, water and tea.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: أُرِيدُ عَصِيرَ الْبُرْتُقَالِ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ، وَزُجَاجَةَ مَاءٍ بَارِدٍ.
lines.bs: Željela bih sok od narandže, molim, i flašu hladne vode.
lines.en: I would like orange juice please, and a bottle of cold water.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: حَسَنًا، سَأُحْضِرُ طَلَبَكُمَا فِي الْحَالِ. هَلْ تَحْتَاجُونَ شَيْئًا آخَرَ؟
lines.bs: Dobro, donijet ću vašu narudžbu odmah. Trebate li još nešto?
lines.en: Very well, I will bring your order right away. Do you need anything else?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: لَا شُكْرًا. كَانَ الطَّعَامُ لَذِيذًا جِدًّا. هَلْ يُمْكِنُنَا الْحُصُولُ عَلَى الْحِسَابِ؟
lines.bs: Ne, hvala. Hrana je bila vrlo ukusna. Možemo li dobiti račun?
lines.en: No thank you. The food was very delicious. Can we have the bill?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: بِالتَّأْكِيدِ، الْمَجْمُوعُ خَمْسَةٌ وَثَلَاثُونَ دُولَارًا. هَلْ تَدْفَعُونَ نَقْدًا أَمْ بِالْبِطَاقَةِ؟
lines.bs: Naravno, ukupno je trideset pet dolara. Plaćate li gotovinom ili karticom?
lines.en: Of course, the total is thirty-five dollars. Are you paying cash or by card?

lines.speaker: A
lines.bs: Platit ću gotovinom. Izvolite četrdeset dolara.
lines.en: I will pay cash. Here are forty dollars.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: شُكْرًا لَكُمْ. هَذَا خَمْسَةُ دُولَارَاتٍ بَاقِيَةٌ. نَتَمَنَّى لَكُمْ مَسَاءً سَعِيدًا!
lines.bs: Hvala vam. Evo pet dolara ostatka. Željemo vam lijepu večer!
lines.en: Thank you. Here is five dollars change. We wish you a pleasant evening!

grammarFocus: dual forms and polite requests with هَلْ يُمْكِنُ
